CustomField.description: À formula that drives the Progress of a target based on actions taken to the target record itself or the associated Contract, or Asset in Deal
CustomField.formula: IF( pro_Target_Readjusted__c = TRUE, 'Target Cancelled', IF( pro_Target_Re_Opened__c = TRUE, 'Re-Opened', /* CLOSED STATUSES */ IF( AND( pro_LOId_Outside_Target_Year__c = TRUE, pro_Contract_Extended__c = FALSE, NOT(ISBLANK(pro_Asset_in_Deal__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.LOI_Date__c)), NOT(pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.leaseworks__Inactive_AT__c) ), 'Achieved - LOI Other', IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(pro_Asset_in_Deal__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.LOI_Date__c)), NOT(pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.leaseworks__Inactive_AT__c), pro_Contract_Extended__c = FALSE ), 'Achieved - LOI', IF( pro_New_Contract_Signed__c = TRUE, 'Achieved - No LOI', IF( pro_Contract_Extended__c = TRUE, 'Achieved - Contract Extended', /* CANCELLED / EXPIRED STATUSES */ IF( OR( ISPICKVAL( pro_Contract__r.leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c, 'Cancelled' ), ISPICKVAL( pro_Contract__r.leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c, 'Lease Expired/Terminated' ), AND( pro_Contract__r.leaseworks__Active__c = FALSE, pro_Contract__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c <= TODAY() ) ), 'Target Cancelled', /* MOVED TO TRADING */ IF( pro_Moved_To_Trading__c = TRUE, 'Moved To Trading', /* OPEN STATUSES */ IF( pro_Target_Forecast__r.pro_End_Date__c < ADDMONTHS(TODAY(), 12), 'Open - Target Date Exceeded', 'Open' ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Progress
